description:
A developer has asked you to create a one–liner utility that scans an 
    existing application log and produces a very small summary file.

    1. The log file already exists at:
       /home/user/projects/myapp/logs/app.log

    2. The utility must look only for lines that contain the literal word
       “ERROR” (all caps, no leading or trailing spaces required, any other
       characters on the same line are allowed).

    3. Your task is to:
       • Count how many lines inside app.log contain the word “ERROR”.
       • Create a new text file named:
         /home/user/projects/myapp/logs/error_summary.txt
       • Write exactly one line to that file using the following format
         (no additional spaces, no additional new-lines at the end):

         ERROR_COUNT=<number_of_error_lines>

         Example (do NOT hard-code):
         ERROR_COUNT=12

    4. You should accomplish everything with a single shell command executed
       from anywhere in the terminal (absolute paths are provided so location
       does not matter).

    5. Verification rules the automated checker will apply:
       • The file /home/user/projects/myapp/logs/error_summary.txt must exist.
       • The file must contain exactly one line, no trailing blank lines.
       • That single line must exactly match the pattern
         “ERROR_COUNT=<integer>”.
       • The integer must be the true count of “ERROR” lines in app.log.

    6. Do NOT modify app.log. Only create error_summary.txt.
truth:
The original log file /home/user/projects/myapp/logs/app.log already
    exists when the scenario starts with the following 10 lines (ending in a
    single trailing newline):

    2024-05-30 12:00:01,001 INFO  Starting application
    2024-05-30 12:00:02,002 ERROR Failed to connect to database
    2024-05-30 12:00:03,003 WARN  Cache miss for key user_123
    2024-05-30 12:00:04,004 ERROR Null pointer exception in module XYZ
    2024-05-30 12:00:05,005 INFO  Processing request id=987
    2024-05-30 12:00:06,006 ERROR Timeout while contacting external API
    2024-05-30 12:00:07,007 DEBUG Retrying connection
    2024-05-30 12:00:08,008 ERROR Invalid credentials for user 'admin'
    2024-05-30 12:00:09,009 INFO  Shutdown sequence initiated
    2024-05-30 12:00:10,010 ERROR Unhandled exception in main loop

    There are exactly 5 lines that contain the word “ERROR”.

    After successful completion, the agent must create the file:
    /home/user/projects/myapp/logs/error_summary.txt

    Its contents must be precisely (with no trailing newline):

    ERROR_COUNT=5
name: task_000000_5c2c965e
